reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Este es además un edificio histórico desde aquí alargaban las carreras de turismo carretera en los años 50 y 60

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. This is also a historic building; it was from here that touring car races were extended in the 1950s and 60s.

reviews.comment:
Los playeros excelentes. La empleada de Shop muy mal educada. Sábado al mediodía. De mal modo me dijo que el baño era para socios o clientes sin saber que era cliente. No lo sabía porque no estaba en su lugar de trabajo cuando me baje del vehículo.

(Translated by Google)
The beachgoers were excellent. The Shop employee was very rude. Saturday at noon. She rudely told me the restroom was for members or customers without knowing I was a customer. She didn't know because she wasn't at her post when I got out of the car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6MXBqRlRBEAE
